untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'anticipatory signal present (fundamental, seasonal, or date-based turning point)' which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. Donchian channels approximate the new high/low extremes and penetration threshold, but the anticipatory/fundamental component is not translatable to technical rules.
translation_notes: Used Donchian Channel (20-bar lookback) to detect new highs/lows as false breakout setup. Range comparison (0.0025 = 0.25%) approximates penetration threshold. Exit conditions implement reversal below/above breakout level. The 'anticipatory signal' prerequisite cannot be coded with technical indicators alone and requires external fundamental/calendar input.
